title: 3D Buckets
description: Get 3D bucket models for your Minecraft without needing any mods!!
body:
There are multiple resource packs that allow you to have 3D buckets in your hand. But this is the first one to do it without mods! Using recently added features this resource pack manages to get these buckets in your hands hassle free!

This resource pack is under the CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 license, which in short means its a Creative Commons resource pack. You're free to use this resource pack in your resource packs as long as you release them under the same license, give credit where credit is due, and make zero profit off of the resource pack!
